summary: Created src/styles/responsive.css with mobile breakpoints at 480px and 600px. The 600px media query was consolidated from generated-site.css into the new file. Added responsive rules for: floating controls (tighter spacing), typography (minimum font sizes), info modal (max-height + scroll), toast (max-width + wrapping), roster table (horizontal scroll), and global overflow prevention. Imported responsive.css last in main.ts for proper cascade order. All 499 tests pass.
